daily_summary.headline: Exciting Aurora and Multiple Launches Await

top_events.title: Aurora Borealis Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2-level geomagnetic storm is expected, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for observers at latitudes down to 55°.
top_events.action: Plan your viewing session and check weather conditions.

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1a Launch - Progress MS-33
top_events.description: A routine resupply mission to the ISS, launching from Baikonur Cosmodrome.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for a glimpse of the launch.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX continues its Starlink satellite deployment with a Falcon 9 launch.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live stream for coverage.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
